name: Chocolate Honey Brownie Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9-inch baking pan lightly.
3. Melt 6 squares of chocolate and butter in a microwavable bowl on HIGH for 2 minutes, stirring until smooth.
4. Stir in sugar and 1/2 cup honey, then add eggs. Mix until just combined with flour.
5. Pour batter into prepared pan.
6. Bake for 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool completely.
7. Melt remaining chocolate and 2 tablespoons honey in another microwavable bowl on HIGH for 1 minute, stirring until smooth.
8. Drizzle over cooled bars and refrigerate for 5 minutes to set chocolate.
9. Cut into bars. Makes 24.
